scenes.description: Omaru Polka performs "Diamond Crevasse" on stage for her birthday 3D live.
scenes.song_name: Diamond Crevasse (ダイアモンド クレバス)

subtitles.original: ダイアモンド クレバス
subtitles.english: Diamond Crevasse

subtitles.original: 神様に恋をしていた頃は
subtitles.english: Back when I was in love with God

subtitles.original: こんな別れが来るとは思ってなかったよ
subtitles.english: I never thought a parting like this would come

subtitles.original: もう二度と触れられないなら
subtitles.english: If I can never touch you again

subtitles.original: せめて最後に　もう一度抱きしめて欲しかったよ
subtitles.english: At least one last time, I wanted you to hold me

subtitles.original: It's long long goodbye
subtitles.english: It's a long, long goodbye

subtitles.original: さよなら　さよなら
subtitles.english: Goodbye, goodbye

subtitles.original: 何度だって自分に無情に言い聞かせて
subtitles.english: Telling myself over and over, heartlessly

subtitles.original: 手を振るのは優しさだよね
subtitles.english: Waving my hand is a form of kindness, right?

subtitles.original: 今　強さが欲しい
subtitles.english: Now, I want strength

subtitles.original: あなたに出会い　輝いて　あたしが生まれて
subtitles.english: Meeting you, shining, I was born

subtitles.original: 愛すればこそ　愛あればこそ
subtitles.english: Precisely because I love you, because there is love

subtitles.original: 希望のない奇跡を待って　どうなるの
subtitles.english: What happens if I wait for a miracle without hope?

subtitles.original: 涙ににじむ星の瞬きは　Gold
subtitles.english: The twinkling of the stars, blurred by tears, is Gold

subtitles.original: 忘れないよ　あなたの温もりも
subtitles.english: I won't forget your warmth

subtitles.original: その優しさも　すべて包んでくれた両手も
subtitles.english: Nor that kindness, nor your hands that wrapped around everything

subtitles.original: It's long long goodbye
subtitles.english: It's a long, long goodbye

subtitles.original: さよなら　さよなら　愛しい人
subtitles.english: Goodbye, goodbye, my beloved

subtitles.original: あなたがいたから　歩いてこれた
subtitles.english: Because you were there, I could walk this far

subtitles.original: ひとりなんかじゃなかったよね
subtitles.english: I wasn't alone, was I?

subtitles.original: 今　答えが欲しい
subtitles.english: Now, I want an answer

subtitles.original: 燃えるような流星　捕まえて　火を灯して
subtitles.english: Catch a burning meteor and light a fire

subtitles.original: 愛していたい　愛されてたい
subtitles.english: I want to keep loving, I want to be loved

subtitles.original: 冷えた身体ひとつで　世界はどうなるの
subtitles.english: With just this chilled body, what will become of the world?

subtitles.original: 張り続けてた虚勢が　溶けてく
subtitles.english: The bluff I kept putting up is melting away

subtitles.original: Long goodbye...
subtitles.english: Long goodbye...

subtitles.original: どうしてだろう　涙あふれて
subtitles.english: I wonder why tears are overflowing

subtitles.original: 止められない
subtitles.english: I can't stop them

subtitles.original: あなたに出会い　輝いて　あたしが生まれて
subtitles.english: Meeting you, shining, I was born

subtitles.original: 愛すればこそ　愛あればこそ
subtitles.english: Precisely because I love you, because there is love

subtitles.original: 希望のない奇跡を待って　どうなるの
subtitles.english: What happens if I wait for a miracle without hope?

subtitles.original: 涙ににじむ星の瞬きは...
subtitles.english: The twinkling of the stars, blurred by tears...

subtitles.original: もし生まれ変わって　また巡り会えるのなら
subtitles.english: If I am reborn and we can meet again

subtitles.original: その時もきっと　あたしを見つけ出して
subtitles.english: In that moment too, please find me

subtitles.original: もう二度と離さないで　捕まえてて
subtitles.english: Never let me go again, hold on to me
